notes.en: Husk turns black (kalu) when ripe — hence the name. Medium-sized red grains, high nutritional value, widely used in Ayurveda.

duration_days.quote: The cultivation period of this variety is 3 ½ months.

traits.quote: This variety of rice has red, medium-sized grains, and the name kalu heenati is given to it because the outer husk of the grains turn black (kalu) when they ripen.
